retry_reason: This is a put callback invoked only when the refcount hits zero; there is no failure path and retry would be a double-put use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is the release callback for a device_link's kref. When the last reference is dropped via kref_put, this function is invoked to finalize the link: it drops the runtime PM reference, removes the link from kernel lists, and unregisters the link's device. After this call, the device_link object is freed and must not be accessed. Callers must not call kref_put again on the same kref.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to release a device_link when its kref reaches zero; it performs cleanup (drop runtime PM ref, remove from lists, unregister device) directly tied to the reference-count lifecycle.
